zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Wentworth於1432年2月13日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可內特萊斯亞德時，他的父親Sir Philip Wentworth31歲，母親Mary Clifford11歲。他於大約1470年2月25日與Anne Saye結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1477年住在英國素福爾可內特萊斯亞德。他於1491年被列為member of parliament for yorkshire 。他去世於1501年2月27日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Wentworth于1432年2月13日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可內特萊斯亞德时，他的父亲Sir Philip Wentworth31岁，母亲Mary Clifford11岁。他于大约1470年2月25日与Anne Saye结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1477年住在英国素福爾可內特萊斯亞德。他于1491年被列为member of parliament for yorkshire 。他去世于1501年2月27日之前。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Wentworth was born on 13 February 1432, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Philip Wentworth, was 31 and his mother, Mary Clifford, was 11. He married Anne Saye about 25 February 1470. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England in 1477. In 1491, his occupation is listed as member of parliament for yorkshire . He died before 27 February 1501.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Wentworth est né le 13 février 1432, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Philip Wentworth, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mary Clifford, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Anne Saye environ 25 février 1470. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre en 1477. En 1491, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament for yorkshire . Il est décédé avant 27 février 1501.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Wentworth am 13. Februar 1432 in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Philip Wentworth 31 und seine Mutter Mary Clifford 11. Er hat um 25. Februar 1470 Anne Saye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1477 hat er in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England gelebt. 1491 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament for yorkshire  aufgeführt. Er starb vor 27. Februar 1501.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Wentworth è nato il il 13 febbraio 1432 nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Philip Wentworth, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mary Clifford, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Anne Saye circa 25 febbraio 1470. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Nettlestead, Suffolk, England nel 1477. Nel 1491, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament for yorkshire . Morì prima del 27 febbraio 1501.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Wentworthが1432年2月13日にイギリスイギリススフォルクネットレステアドで生まれた時，父Sir Philip Wentworthは31歳，母Mary Cliffordは11歳であった。約1470年2月25日にAnne Sayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1477年にはイギリススフォルクネットレステアドに住んでいた。1491年，職業はmember of parliament for yorkshire と記録されている。彼は1501年2月27日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Wentworth(이)가 1432년 2월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Philip Wentworth(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Clifford(은)는 11세였다. 그는 대략 1470년 2월 25일 Anne Saye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1477년도에 영국 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 살았다. 1491년, 그의 직업은 member of parliament for yorkshire 이었다. 그는 1501년 2월 27일 이전 사망했다.

pt.13 February 1432–before 27 February 1501: 13 de fevereiro de 1432–antes 27 de fevereiro de 1501
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Wentworth nasceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1432, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Philip Wentworth, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mary Clifford, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Saye aproximadamente 25 de fevereiro de 1470. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra em 1477. Em 1491, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament for yorkshire . Ele faleceu antes 27 de fevereiro de 1501.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Wentworth родился 13 февраля 1432 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Philip Wentworth было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Clifford, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Saye около 25 февраля 1470 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия в 1477 году. В 1491 году он работал по профессии member of parliament for yorkshire . Он умер перед 27 февраль 1501 г.

es.13 February 1432–before 27 February 1501: 13 de febrero de 1432–antes de 27 de febrero de 1501
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry Wentworth nació el 13 de febrero de 1432, en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Philip Wentworth, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mary Clifford, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Anne Saye aproximadamente 25 de febrero de 1470. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra en 1477. En 1491, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament for yorkshire . Murió antes de 27 de febrero de 1501.
